metadata.description: Personal Claude Code skills by Santhosh Gandhi — context-manager, frugal-token-usage, soft-predict-future, hard-predict-future

plugins.name: context-manager
plugins.description: File-based project context system. SETUP, RESUME, UPDATE modes. Any AI tool can resume any project from docs/context/pointers.md — Claude, Codex, Cursor, Windsurf.

plugins.name: frugal-token-usage
plugins.description: Mid-session audit that enforces minimal-token behaviour. Stops unnecessary Bash, enforces dedicated tools, cuts verbose responses.

plugins.name: soft-predict-future
plugins.description: Claude-native strategic foresight using IFTF methodology. Structural drivers, cross-impact analysis, backcasting, four-scenario reports with VERDICT. Works on claude.ai and Claude Code.

plugins.name: hard-predict-future
plugins.description: Deterministic 12-step foresight agent. Python-computed scores, identical output every run, full JSON audit trail. Requires Claude Code.
